name: theo-pulls-back
prompt: Medium shot. Young man with glasses pulling backward, hand on unseen person's arm. Urgent expression, trying to restrain. Academy hall crowd visible blurred behind him. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Theo
dialogue.text: Doesn't matter. Senna's A-Class. You're D-Class. Stay in your lane.

name: kade-smile
prompt: Close-up. Dark-haired young man, sharp jawline, amber eyes intense and decided. Not a nice smile — dangerous, charming, determined. Heat shimmer visible around him. Dark radiating lines behind — impact moment. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style
